name: Copper Peptide (GHK-Cu)
molecular_target: Upregulates collagen, elastin, and decorin synthesis; modulates metalloproteinases.
clinical_use: Accelerates wound healing, skin rejuvenation, and exhibits anti-inflammatory properties.
reported_side_effects: Generally none topically; potential flushing or localized irritation if concentration is excessively high.

name: Argireline (Acetyl Hexapeptide-8)
molecular_target: Mimics the N-terminal end of the SNAP-25 protein; competitively inhibits the SNARE complex formation to destabilize vesicle release of acetylcholine.
clinical_use: Topical reduction of expression wrinkle depth caused by repetitive muscle movement.
reported_side_effects: Exceedingly low toxicity profile; mild skin dryness or peeling in sensitive individuals if overused.
